# infisical_cert_manager_identity (Resource)

Manage identity memberships in Certificate Manager. Only Machine Identity authentication is supported for this resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    infisical = {
      source = "infisical/infisical"
    }
  }
}

provider "infisical" {
  host          = "https://app.infisical.com"
  client_id     = var.client_id
  client_secret = var.client_secret
}

resource "infisical_cert_manager_identity" "ci" {
  identity_id = "<identity-id>"
  role        = "admin"
}

resource "infisical_cert_manager_identity" "deploy_bot" {
  identity_id = "<identity-id>"
  role        = "member"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `identity_id` (String) The ID of the identity
- `role` (String) The role to assign to the identity (admin, member, or viewer)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the identity membership
- `membership_id` (String) The ID of the identity membership

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# This will import the Certificate Manager identity membership by the identity ID
terraform import infisical_cert_manager_identity.example <identity_id>
```
